KWOP:as.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}as{/c} keyword-operator attempts to convert a value to a specified type. If the conversion fails, it returns null instead of throwing an error.

KWOP:default.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}default{/c} keyword-operator returns the default value for the provided type.

KWOP:is.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}is{/c} keyword-operator checks whether a value matches a given type or pattern.

KWOP:nameof.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}nameof{/c} keyword-operator returns the name of a variable, type, or member as a string.

KWOP:sizeof.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}sizeof{/c} keyword-operator returns the number of bytes occupied by a variable of a given type.

KWOP:typeof.Definition: The {c:color-blue keyword}typeof{/c} keyword-operator produces the System.Type instance for the specified type.
